# Accounts Receivable Module

Module ID: accounts-receivable
Status: draft
Purpose: Tenant-scoped customer payment application, open receivables, aging, and statement workflows.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Check: pnpm check:spec
Build: pnpm build

Core invariants:
- Money is integer cents.
- Customer payment recording is idempotent per tenant on idempotencyKey.
- Payment application rejects over-application against both the payment amount and invoice total.
- Invoice/payment/accounting integrations are ports or emitted events; this module does not mutate invoice core tables.
